environment.machine: clean Windows VM or physical machine

checks.notes: Install NSIS package on a clean Windows machine.
Launch installed app and confirm it remains running.
Confirm transparent pet window renders with alpha.
Confirm drag, screen bounds, always-on-top, focus, and taskbar behavior.
Open Pet, Actions, AI, Plugins, Catalog, Service, and About tabs.
Run built-in actions and import an ordered frame folder.
Inspect, import, enable, and delete a pet pack under Windows userData paths.
Run official and local plugin commands through the restricted SDK.
Fresh install keeps Local HTTP/MCP disabled by default.
Enable Local HTTP/MCP and verify loopback-only token-gated behavior.
Verify API keys do not appear in renderer, plugin SDK responses, logs, or exports.
About update check shows Windows installers and hides macOS assets/feed metadata.
Uninstall and verify user data preservation strategy.
